title: System Design for Beginners (Full Guide)
summary: AWS Developers presents a 7-step system design framework prioritizing problem understanding before technology selection. The framework covers requirements, traffic estimation, high-level components, API contracts, tech stack selection, and implementation constraints, using a URL shortener as the example interview problem.
writeup: This guide from AWS Developers lays out a 7-step system design framework that puts problem understanding ahead of technology selection. The steps cover requirements, traffic estimation, high-level components, API contracts, tech stack selection, and implementation constraints, walking through a URL shortener as the example interview problem. The framework matters because it sequences scalability planning so that components and tech choices follow from defined requirements rather than precede them. The concrete takeaway is an ordered approach for structuring system design answers, from clarifying the problem to scoping constraints.
